lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭ ਸਾਰੀ ਕੀਤੇ ਪਾਸਾ ਢਾਲਣਿ ਆਪਿ ਲਗਾ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh saaree keete paasaa dtaalan aap lagaa |26|
lines.english: He made all beings and creatures his chessmen, and He Himself threw the dice. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਭੈ ਭਾਲਹਿ ਸੇ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਭਉ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhabhai bhaaleh se fal paaveh gur parasaadee jina kau bhau peaa |
lines.english: Bhabha: Those who search, find the fruits of their rewards; by Guru's Grace, they live in the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਮੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਮਧੁਸੂਦਨੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਭਇਆ ਤਬ ਚੇਤਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mamai mohu maran madhusoodan maran bheaa tab chetaviaa |
lines.english: Mamma: In emotional attachment, he dies; he only thinks of the Lord, the Love of Nectar, when he dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਨ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਫੇਰੁ ਪਇਆ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: manamukh fireh na cheteh moorre lakh chauraaseeh fer peaa |27|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs wander around, and they do not remember the Lord; the fools are consigned to the cycle of 8.4 million incarnations. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਅਵਰੋ ਪੜਿਆ ਮੰਮਾ ਅਖਰੁ ਵੀਸਰਿਆ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa bheetar avaro parriaa mamaa akhar veesariaa |28|
lines.english: As long as the body is alive, he reads other things, and forgets the letter 'm', which stands for marnaa - death. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਯੈ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਕਦ ਹੀ ਜੇ ਕਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: yayai janam na hovee kad hee je kar sach pachhaanai |
lines.english: Yaya: He is never reincarnated again, if he recognizes the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਖੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: guramukh aakhai guramukh boojhai guramukh eko jaanai |29|
lines.english: The Gurmukh speaks, the Gurmukh understands, and the Gurmukh knows only the One Lord. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਇ ਧੰਧੈ ਸਭ ਲਾਏ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਆ ਤਿਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਇਆ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: jant upaae dhandhai sabh laae karam hoaa tin naam leaa |30|
lines.english: Having created His beings, He has put them all to work; they alone remember the Naam, upon whom He bestows His Grace. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਰੈ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੇਤੇ ਕੀਏ ਜੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: raarai rav rahiaa sabh antar jete kee jantaa |
lines.english: Rarra: The Lord is contained among all; He created all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਣਾ ਪੀਣਾ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਸਹਣਾ ਭਾਣੈ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਇਆ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: khaanaa peenaa sam kar sahanaa bhaanai taa kai hukam peaa |31|
lines.english: We eat and drink; we should endure equally whatever occurs, by His Will, by His Command. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਲੈ ਲਾਇ ਧੰਧੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਛੋਡੀ ਮੀਠਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: lalai laae dhandhai jin chhoddee meetthaa maaeaa mohu keea |
lines.english: Lalla: He has assigned people to their tasks, and made the love of Maya seem sweet to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਵੈ ਵਾਸੁਦੇਉ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਵੇਖਣ ਕਉ ਜਿਨਿ ਵੇਸੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: vavai vaasudeo paramesar vekhan kau jin ves keea |
lines.english: Wawa: The all-pervading Transcendent Lord beholds the world; He created the form it wears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖੈ ਚਾਖੈ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: vekhai chaakhai sabh kichh jaanai antar baahar rav rahiaa |32|
lines.english: He beholds, tastes, and knows everything; He is pervading and permeating inwardly and outwardly. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ੜਾੜੈ ਰਾੜਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਕਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਜਿ ਅਮਰੁ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: rraarrai raarr kareh kiaa praanee tiseh dhiaavahu ji amar hoaa |
lines.english: Rarra: Why do you quarrel, O mortal? Meditate on the Imperishable Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਹੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਦਾਤਾ ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਇ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: haahai hor na koee daataa jeea upaae jin rijak deea |
lines.english: Haha: There is no other Giver than Him; having created the creatures, He gives them nourishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਹੁ ਓਸੁ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ਕੀਆ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: tiseh dhiaavahu sach samaavahu os vittahu kurabaan keea |33|
lines.english: and be absorbed into the True One. Become a sacrifice to Him. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਹੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੀਆ ॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaavahu har naam samaavahu anadin laahaa har naam leea |34|
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord's Name, be absorbed into the Lord's Name, and night and day, reap the Profit of the Lord's Name. ||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਇਰ ਇਵ ਕਹਿਆ ॥੩੫॥੧॥
lines.translit: kare karaae sabh kichh jaanai naanak saaeir iv kahiaa |35|1|
lines.english: He acts, and causes others to act, and He knows everything; so says Nanak, the poet. ||35||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇੜੈ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਛੋਡੀ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aaeirrai aap kare jin chhoddee jo kichh karanaa su kar rahiaa |
lines.english: Airaa: He Himself created the world; whatever He has to do, He continues to do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਪਟੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa mahalaa 3 pattee |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, Third Mehl, Patee - The Alphabet:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਯੋ ਅੰਙੈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਆਇਆ ਕਾਖੈ ਘੰਙੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ayo angai sabh jag aaeaa kaakhai ghangai kaal bheaa |
lines.english: Ayo, Angai: The whole world which was created - Kaahkai, Ghangai: It shall pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੀਰੀ ਲਲੀ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਣੇ ਪੜਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਗੁਣ ਵੀਸਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: reeree lalee paap kamaane parr avagan gun veesariaa |1|
lines.english: Reeree, Laalee: People commit sins, and falling into vice, forget virtue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਦੇਣਾ ਤੇਰੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa denaa terai sir rahiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: which shall call you to answer for payment? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਐਸਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਤੂੰ ਕੀ ਪੜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: man aisaa lekhaa toon kee parriaa |
lines.english: O mortal, why have you studied such an account,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧੰਙਾਇਐ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਨੰਨੈ ਨਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sidhangaaeiai simareh naahee nanai naa tudh naam leaa |
lines.english: Sidhan, Ngaayiyai: You do not remember the Lord. Nanna: You do not take the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਛੈ ਛੀਜਹਿ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਕਿਉ ਛੂਟਹਿ ਜਮਿ ਪਾਕੜਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chhachhai chheejeh ahinis moorre kiau chhootteh jam paakarriaa |2|
lines.english: Chhachha: You are wearing away, every night and day; you fool, how will you find release? You are held in the grip of death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਣਹੋਦਾ ਨਾਉ ਧਰਾਇਓ ਪਾਧਾ ਅਵਰਾ ਕਾ ਭਾਰੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਲਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anahodaa naau dharaaeo paadhaa avaraa kaa bhaar tudh leaa |3|
lines.english: Without justification, you call yourself a teacher; thus you take on the loads of others. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਬੈ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਮੂੜੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲੇ ਤੇਰਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: babai boojheh naahee moorre bharam bhule teraa janam geaa |
lines.english: Babba: You do not understand, you fool; deluded by doubt, you are wasting your life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਜੈ ਜੋਤਿ ਹਿਰਿ ਲਈ ਤੇਰੀ ਮੂੜੇ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਹਿਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jajai jot hir lee teree moorre ant geaa pachhutaavahigaa |
lines.english: Jajja: You have been robbed of your Light, you fool; in the end, you shall have to depart, and you shall regret and repent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਤੂੰ ਚੀਨਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੂਨੀ ਆਵਹਿਗਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: ek sabad toon cheeneh naahee fir fir joonee aavahigaa |4|
lines.english: You have not remembered the One Word of the Shabad, and so you shall have to enter the womb over and over again. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਪੜੁ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਅਵਰਾ ਨੋ ਨ ਸਿਖਾਲਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh sir likhiaa so parr panddit avaraa no na sikhaal bikhiaa |
lines.english: Read that which is written on your forehead, O Pandit, and do not teach wickedness to others.
